text: 🇮🇷 🚢 Iran seizes two ships in strait of Hormuz - Just In Iran’s Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) navy has seized two ships in the strait of Hormuz, according to Iran’s semi-official Tasnim news agency. The ships were identified as MSC Francesca and Epaminondas , which were reportedly directed to Iranian shores after they were “operating without the required authorisation and for ⁠manipulating navigation systems”. The IRGC was quoted as saying : “Disrupting order and safety in the strait of Hormuz is our red line.” @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🚢 伊朗在霍尔木兹海峡扣押两艘船只 - 最新消息 据伊朗半官方塔斯尼姆通讯社报道，伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）海军在霍尔木兹海峡扣押了两艘船只。这两艘船被确认为“MSC Francesca”号和“Epaminondas”号，据报道，它们在“未经必要授权且操纵导航系统”后被引导至伊朗海岸。据援引革命卫队的话称：“破坏霍尔木兹海峡的秩序和安全是我们的红线。” @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 🚢 🆘 Third ship attacked in strait of Hormuz A third ship has been attacked in the strait of Hormuz, the BBC has reported. Maritime intelligence company Vanguard told BBC Verify that the ship was targeted about 6 nautical miles off the coast of Iran. Vanguard said the vessel was hailed by the Iran’s Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) and “instructed to drop anchor”. The ship has reported “damage to the hull and accommodation”. @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🚢 🆘 第三艘船只在霍尔木兹海峡遇袭 据英国广播公司（BBC）报道，第三艘船只在霍尔木兹海峡遇袭。海事情报公司Vanguard告诉BBC核查部门，该船在距离伊朗海岸约6海里处成为目标。Vanguard称，该船只被伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）呼叫并“被指示抛锚”。该船报告称“船体和居住区受损”。 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇷Israeli Foreign Minister Saar says that there is no real alternative for Lebanon to be free from Iranian occupation than to work with Israel. "It requires more clarity and the courage to take risks, but there is no real alternative for ensuring…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Israeli Foreign Minister Saar says that the Israelis want a real peace. "The people of Israel want and have always want peace, a real peace, a peace that is not based on illusions and on the abandonment of our future and security, a peace rooted in security." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇷以色列外交部长萨尔表示，黎巴嫩要摆脱伊朗占领，除了与以色列合作外，没有真正的选择。“这需要更多的清晰度和承担风险的勇气，但要确保……没有真正的选择。” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列外交部长萨尔表示，以色列人想要真正的和平。“以色列人民想要并且一直想要和平，真正的和平，一种不是建立在幻想之上、不是建立在放弃我们的未来和安全之上的和平，一种植根于安全的和平。” @wfwitness

text: OSINTdefender United Kingdom Maritime Trade Operations (UKMTO) Centre Reported two separate incidents earlier today, likely the MSC Francesca and the Epaminodes, between 8nm and 15nm west of Oman, before the Islamic Revolutionary Guards Corps Navy (IRGC-N) announced that both vessels were stopped and directed towards Iranian waters. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 英国海上贸易行动中心（UKMTO）今天早些时候报告了两个独立的事件，很可能是“MSC Francesca”号和“Epaminodes”号，地点在阿曼以西8至15海里处，随后伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军（IRGC-N）宣布两艘船只均已被拦截并被引导至伊朗水域。推文

text: OSINTtechnical Iran's IRGC Navy says that it captured a pair of container ships that attempted to sail through the Strait of Hormuz this morning. The ships were attacked and then seized by Iranian forces. https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2046895055722434571/video/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军称，今天上午拦截了两艘试图通过霍尔木兹海峡的集装箱船。这些船只遭到袭击，随后被伊朗军队扣押。 https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2046895055722434571/video/1 推文

text: The Spectator Index Iranian Revolutionary Guards say they have seized two vessels in the Strait of Hormuz . tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 伊朗革命卫队称他们已在霍尔木兹海峡扣押了两艘船只。推文

text: OSINTdefender Following reports that the Islamic Revolutionary Guards Corps Navy (IRGC-N) seized two vessels today in the Strait of Hormuz, both vessels, the Epaminodes and the MSC Francesca can be viewed off the coast of Iran on MarineTraffic. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2046894116743589929/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 在有报道称伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军（IRGC-N）今天在霍尔木兹海峡扣押了两艘船只后，这两艘船“Epaminodes”号和“MSC Francesca”号都可以在MarineTraffic上看到位于伊朗海岸附近。 https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2046894116743589929/photo/1 推文

text: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇺🇲 The 3rd container ship was also shot at – the previous 2 ships were detained and the goods on them were seized. ‼️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇲 Since morning, Iranians have struck a second large container ship in the Gulf of Oman. Meanwhile, Trump states that he does not intend to lift the blockade and, against the backdrop of the economic crisis caused by financial losses, indirectly hints at a potential uprising caused by the unpaid Iranian police and military. - Visioner tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇺🇲 第三艘集装箱船也遭到射击——前两艘船已被扣留，船上货物被没收。‼️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇲 自上午以来，伊朗人在阿曼湾袭击了第二艘大型集装箱船。与此同时，特朗普表示他不打算解除封锁，在金融损失导致的经济危机背景下，他间接暗示了因伊朗警察和军队未获报酬而可能引发的起义。 - Visioner 推文

text: Open Source Intel IRGC LINKED TASNIM POSTS VIDEO MOCKING PRESIDENT TRUMP https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046892837631844526/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 与革命卫队有关联的塔斯尼姆通讯社发布视频嘲讽特朗普总统 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046892837631844526/video/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender In a notable development, the Islamic Revolutionary Guards Corps Navy (IRGC-N) has said that they seized two vessels, the MSC Francesca and the Epaminodes, in the Strait of Hormuz and brought them back to the Iranian coast. This, as U.S. President Donald J. Trump announced the indefinite extension of the ceasefire just yesterday. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 在一个值得注意的事态发展中，伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军（IRGC-N）表示，他们在霍尔木兹海峡扣押了两艘船只“MSC Francesca”号和“Epaminodes”号，并将它们带回了伊朗海岸。就在昨天，美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普宣布无限期延长停火协议。推文

text: Open Source Intel Israel Foreign Minister, Sa'ar: Unfortunately, Lebanon is a failed state, a state that is de facto under Iranian occupation through Hezbollah. But this also leads to a conclusion: Hezbollah is a common enemy of Israel and Lebanon. Just as it threatens Israel’s security, it harms Lebanon’s sovereignty and threatens its future. We do not have any serious disagreements with Lebanon. There are a few minor border disputes that can be solved. The obstacle to peace and normalization between the countries is one: Hezbollah. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 以色列外交部长萨尔：不幸的是，黎巴嫩是一个失败的国家，一个实际上处于伊朗通过真主党进行占领之下的国家。但这也得出一个结论：真主党是以色列和黎巴嫩的共同敌人。正如它威胁以色列的安全一样，它也损害了黎巴嫩的主权并威胁其未来。我们与黎巴嫩没有任何严重分歧。有一些小的边界争端是可以解决的。两国之间实现和平与关系正常化的障碍只有一个：真主党。推文

text: Open Source Intel The IRGC Navy Command: “Two violating ships, "MSC-FRANCESCA" (linked to the Zionist regime) and "EPAMINODES," which endangered maritime security by operating without the necessary permits and tampering with navigation systems, were seized by the IRGC Navy and directed to the coast of Iran.” JUST IN 🔴 Iran’s Revolutionary Guards claim they intercepted 2 vessels and escorted them into Iranian territorial waters. - Tasnim - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 革命卫队海军司令部：“两艘违规船只，‘MSC-FRANCESCA’号（与犹太复国主义政权有关联）和‘EPAMINODES’号，因在没有必要许可的情况下运营并篡改导航系统而危及海上安全，已被革命卫队海军扣押并被引导至伊朗海岸。” 最新消息 🔴 伊朗革命卫队声称他们拦截了2艘船只并将它们护送进入伊朗领海。 - 塔斯尼姆 - Open Source Intel 推文

text: Open Source Intel JUST IN 🔴 Iran’s Revolutionary Guards claim they intercepted 2 vessels and escorted them into Iranian territorial waters. - Tasnim tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 最新消息 🔴 伊朗革命卫队声称他们拦截了2艘船只并将它们护送进入伊朗领海。 - 塔斯尼姆 推文

text: Open Source Intel Armenian MFA: "We extend our congratulations to the Government and people of Israel on Yom HaAtzmaut. Armenia stands ready to expand ties and explore new opportunities for cooperation." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046889354488955070/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 亚美尼亚外交部：“我们向以色列政府和人民致以独立日（Yom HaAtzmaut）的祝贺。亚美尼亚随时准备扩大联系并探索新的合作机会。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046889354488955070/photo/1 推文

text: WarTranslated The Russian war criminal Putin stated that they in the Russian Federation know how the war will end and do not want to make any statements about it. They will continue to pursue their goals. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2046889248377262315/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 俄罗斯战犯普京表示，他们在俄罗斯联邦知道战争将如何结束，并且不想对此发表任何声明。他们将继续追求他们的目标。 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2046889248377262315/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Islamic regime supporters in a message to President Trump: “Your land will be destroyed” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046889200474108010/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 伊斯兰政权支持者在给特朗普总统的信息中称：“你们的土地将被摧毁” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046889200474108010/video/1 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧Israeli Foreign Minister Saar calls on Lebanon to work with Israel against Hezbollah. "Let's work together against the terrorist state that Hezbollah built in your territory. This cooperation is needed by you even more than by us. It requires more…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇷 Israeli Foreign Minister Saar says that there is no real alternative for Lebanon to be free from Iranian occupation than to work with Israel. "It requires more clarity and the courage to take risks, but there is no real alternative for ensuring a future of peace for you and for us. And for you, for Lebanon, a future of sovereignty, independence, and freedom from the Iranian occupation." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧以色列外交部长萨尔呼吁黎巴嫩与以色列合作对抗真主党。‘让我们共同对抗真主党在你们领土上建立的恐怖主义国家。这种合作对你们的需求甚至比对我们更大。它需要更多……’” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇷 以色列外交部长萨尔表示，对于黎巴嫩来说，除了与以色列合作外，没有其他真正的选择可以摆脱伊朗的占领。‘这需要更多的清晰度和承担风险的勇气，但为了确保你们和我们的和平未来，没有真正的替代方案。对于你们，对于黎巴嫩来说，这是一个主权、独立和摆脱伊朗占领的未来。’” @wfwitness

text: BREAKING: Iran’s Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps Navy seized two ships for alleged navigation violations and escorted them to Iranian shores.
text_zh: 突发：伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军扣押了两艘船只，理由是涉嫌违反航行规定，并将它们护送至伊朗海岸。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇪🇺 🌐 Politico : US President Trump is considering punitive measures against several NATO allies, including placing them on a “consequences list” over what he views as lack of support. The measures under discussion include potential restrictions on military cooperation and broader pressure on countries seen as not aligning with US priorities. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇪🇺 🌐 Politico：美国总统特朗普正在考虑对几个北约盟国采取惩罚性措施，包括因他认为这些国家缺乏支持而将它们列入“后果清单”。正在讨论的措施包括对军事合作的潜在限制，以及对被视为未与美国优先事项保持一致的国家施加更广泛的压力。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇷🇺 🇰🇿 🇩🇪 FT: Russia is planning to suspend the flow of Kazakh oil to Germany via the Druzhba pipeline, threatening supplies to a key refinery that serves Berlin. The move could impact the PCK refinery in Schwedt, which supplies much of the fuel used in the Berlin and Brandenburg region. Industry sources say updated export schedules have already been sent to Kazakhstan and Germany, though the Kremlin has not officially confirmed the decision. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇷🇺 🇰🇿 🇩🇪 金融时报：俄罗斯计划通过“友谊”输油管道暂停向德国输送哈萨克斯坦石油，这威胁到了为柏林提供服务的一家关键炼油厂的供应。此举可能会影响施韦特的PCK炼油厂，该厂供应了柏林和勃兰登堡地区使用的大部分燃料。业内消息人士称，更新后的出口时间表已经发送给哈萨克斯坦和德国，尽管克里姆林宫尚未正式确认该决定。 @wfwitness

text: NATO's Rutte in Türkiye: Türkiye has gone through a defense industrial revolution. I could really say there’s been a revolution in recent years. ASELSAN is at the forefront of this. So please keep it up — produce and innovate even more and faster.
text_zh: 北约秘书长吕特在土耳其：土耳其经历了一场国防工业革命。我真的可以说近年来发生了一场革命。阿塞尔桑（ASELSAN）处于这场革命的最前沿。所以请继续保持——生产和创新得更多、更快。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧Israeli Foreign Minister Saar says that Israel has no serious disagreements with Lebanon, accusing Hezbollah as the main obstacle to peace. "We don't have any serious disagreements with Lebanon. There are a few minor border disputes that can be solved.…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Israeli Foreign Minister Saar calls on Lebanon to work with Israel against Hezbollah. "Let's work together against the terrorist state that Hezbollah built in your territory. This cooperation is needed by you even more than by us. It requires more clarity and the courage to take risks, but there is no real alternative for ensuring a future of peace for you and for us." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧以色列外交部长萨尔表示，以色列与黎巴嫩之间没有严重分歧，并指责真主党是和平的主要障碍。‘我们与黎巴嫩之间没有任何严重分歧。有一些小的边界争端是可以解决的……’” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列外交部长萨尔呼吁黎巴嫩与以色列合作对抗真主党。‘让我们共同对抗真主党在你们领土上建立的恐怖主义国家。这种合作对你们的需求甚至比对我们更大。它需要更多的清晰度和承担风险的勇气，但为了确保你们和我们的和平未来，没有真正的替代方案。’” @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 Spokesperson for Iranian FM Esmaeil Baqaei, in response to Pakistan's request to extend the ceasefire, said Iran was not the initiator of the war and that its actions are in line with legitimate self-defense. He said Iran's armed forces are ready to firmly defend the country, adding that Iran will use every opportunity to hold the aggressors accountable and demand compensation. Regarding negotiations, Baqaei said Iran will take action once a ceasefire which can consolidate Iran's defensive achievements is proposed. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊在回应巴基斯坦延长停火的请求时表示，伊朗不是战争的发起者，其行动符合合法的自卫。他表示，伊朗武装部队已准备好坚定捍卫国家，并补充说伊朗将利用一切机会追究侵略者的责任并要求赔偿。关于谈判，巴盖伊表示，一旦提出能够巩固伊朗防御成果的停火协议，伊朗将采取行动。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇷Israeli Foreign Minister Saar described Lebanon as a failed state under de facto Iranian control ahead of negotiations tomorrow. "We made a historic decision to negotiate directly with Lebanon after more than forty years. Unfortunately, Lebanon…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Israeli Foreign Minister Saar says that Israel has no serious disagreements with Lebanon, accusing Hezbollah as the main obstacle to peace. "We don't have any serious disagreements with Lebanon. There are a few minor border disputes that can be solved. The obstacle to peace and normalization between the countries is one, Hezbollah." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇷以色列外交部长萨尔在明天谈判前将黎巴嫩描述为一个处于伊朗事实控制下的失败国家。“我们做出了一个历史性的决定，在四十多年后直接与黎巴嫩进行谈判。不幸的是，黎巴嫩……” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列外交部长萨尔表示，以色列与黎巴嫩之间没有严重分歧，并指责真主党是和平的主要障碍。“我们与黎巴嫩之间没有任何严重分歧。有一些小的边界争端是可以解决的。两国之间和平与关系正常化的障碍只有一个，那就是真主党。” @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 Taco Tuesday
text_zh: 🇺🇸 塔可周二

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇷 Israeli Foreign Minister Saar described Lebanon as a failed state under de facto Iranian control ahead of negotiations tomorrow. "We made a historic decision to negotiate directly with Lebanon after more than forty years. Unfortunately, Lebanon is a failed state, a state that is de facto under Iranian occupation through Hezbollah. But this also leads to a conclusion. Hezbollah is common enemy of Israel and Lebanon." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇷 以色列外交部长萨尔在明天谈判前将黎巴嫩描述为一个处于伊朗事实控制下的失败国家。“我们做出了一个历史性的决定，在四十多年后直接与黎巴嫩进行谈判。不幸的是，黎巴嫩是一个失败的国家，一个通过真主党实际上处于伊朗占领下的国家。但这同时也得出一个结论。真主党是以色列和黎巴嫩共同的敌人。” @wfwitness

text: NATO's Rutte in Türkiye: Defense industrial production will be extremely important, because we have to do better, we have to do more, and we can learn a lot from what Türkiye is doing here.
text_zh: 北约秘书长吕特在土耳其：国防工业生产将极其重要，因为我们必须做得更好，我们必须做得更多，而且我们可以从土耳其在这里所做的事情中学到很多。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 The IRGC Navy announces the seizure of two vessels in the coast of Iran. MSC-FRANCESCA with alleged links to Israel, and EPAMINODES, were seized by the IRGC Navy and directed to the coast of Iran. IRGC Navy added that the ships violated maritime security by operating without the necessary permits and tampering with navigation systems. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 伊斯兰革命卫队海军宣布在伊朗海岸扣押了两艘船只。据称与以色列有联系的“MSC-FRANCESCA”号和“EPAMINODES”号被伊斯兰革命卫队海军扣押并被带往伊朗海岸。伊斯兰革命卫队海军补充说，这些船只在没有必要许可的情况下运营并篡改导航系统，违反了海上安全。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇱 🇦🇷 ⚡️ Apparently a man with a WIG is still in Israel… once again having a DEEP, EMOTIONAL HEART-TO-WALL conversation at the Western Wall
text_zh: 🇮🇱 🇦🇷 ⚡️ 显然，一个戴着假发的人还在以色列……再次在西墙进行了一次深刻、感人的“面对墙”对话

text: 📝 Свободу нейрослопу 📝 Как израильские лоббисты кормят Трампа фейками Дональд Трамп не оставляет попыток выглядеть миротворцем и просит иранские власти не казнить через повешение восьмерых миловидных девушек, существующих, впрочем, только в виде пикселей и нейросетевых артефактов. Прекрасное порождение нейросетей опубликовал политический активист Эяль Якоби , сопроводив его тезисами о молчании правозащитных организаций. Американский президент недолго думая подхватил эмоциональный нарратив, распространенный произраильскими СМИ и, видимо, лично присланный ему известным еврейским лоббистом Марком Левиным , что тоже привычная история . ➡️ Отдельно позабавил тот факт, как некоторые российские оппозиционные политологи-эмигранты начали хвалить Трампа за этот гениальный ход , якобы поставивший иранцев в неудобное положение. В любом случае, на фоне прочих скандалов, этот сильнее испортить переговоры уже не смог. ❗️ Но не только Израиль активно мешает мирным переговорам. Сам Трамп делает для этого куда больше (в том числе вопреки советам своей администрации), в первую очередь тем, что пытается давить на Иран через соцсети, выставлять иранцев побежденной стороной, и прямо во время подготовки к встрече заявлять, что США используют передышку, чтобы перевооружиться и нанести новый удар. Ну и вряд ли стоит рассчитывать, что такой подход и особый стиль президента США внезапно расположат оппонентов к мирному общению, а не к подготовке к новой эскалации. #Израиль #медиатехнологии #США ✈️ RU | ✈️ EN | ✉️ MAX ✉️ VK | ✉️ RuTube | ✉️ ОК | ✉️ Дзен 💸 Поддержать нас
text_zh: 📝 自由属于神经假象 📝 以色列游说者如何用假新闻喂养特朗普。唐纳德·特朗普并没有放弃表现得像个和平缔造者的尝试，他请求伊朗当局不要绞死八名漂亮的女孩，然而这些女孩只存在于像素和神经网络生成的图像中。政治活动家埃亚尔·雅各比（Eyal Yakoby）发布了这些精美的神经网络产物，并附上了关于人权组织保持沉默的论点。美国总统没有多想就采纳了这种情绪化的叙事，这种叙事由亲以色列媒体传播，显然是由著名的犹太游说者马克·莱文（Mark Levin）亲自发给他的，这也是惯常的操作。 ➡️ 另外，一些俄罗斯反对派流亡政治学家开始称赞特朗普这一“天才举动”，声称这让伊朗人陷入了尴尬境地，这一事实令人感到好笑。无论如何，在其他丑闻的背景下，这已经无法让谈判变得更糟了。 ❗️ 但不仅仅是以色列在积极阻碍和平谈判。特朗普本人为此做的更多（包括违背其政府的建议），首先是通过社交媒体向伊朗施压，将伊朗人描绘成战败的一方，并在准备会晤期间直接声称美国正在利用喘息机会重新武装并进行新的打击。而且，很难指望这种做法和美国总统的特殊风格会突然让对手倾向于和平交流，而不是为新的升级做准备。 #以色列 #媒体技术 #美国 ✈️ RU | ✈️ EN | ✉️ MAX ✉️ VK | ✉️ RuTube | ✉️ OK | ✉️ Dzen 💸 支持我们

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 IDF announced the elimination of Muhammad Hamis Katzatz in southern Gaza Strip, who allegedly approached the yellow line and posed a threat to IDF forces operating in the area. Katzatz had also allegedly participated in October 7 attacks, targeting Kibbutz Nir Oz. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 以色列国防军宣布在加沙地带南部消灭了穆罕默德·哈米斯·卡扎茨（Muhammad Hamis Katzatz），据称他接近了黄线并对在该地区行动的以色列国防军部队构成了威胁。据称卡扎茨还参与了10月7日的袭击，目标是尼尔奥兹基布兹（Kibbutz Nir Oz）。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 🚢 🆘 Second ship reports attack in strait of Hormuz . The UK Maritime Trade Operations (UKMTO) said it received a report of a second ship coming under attack in the strait of Hormuz. A cargo ship was fired at about 8 nautical miles northwest of Iran, UKMTO said, although it did not say where the shots were fired from. In a report issued this morning, UKMTO said: “A master of an outbound cargo ship reports having been fired upon and is now stopped in the water. Crew are safe and accounted for. There is no reported damage to the vessel. @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🚢 🆘 第二艘船只报告在霍尔木兹海峡遇袭。英国海上贸易行动办公室（UKMTO）表示，收到第二艘船只在霍尔木兹海峡遇袭的报告。UKMTO称，一艘货船在伊朗西北约8海里处遭到射击，但未说明射击来源。在今早发布的一份报告中，UKMTO表示：“一艘出境货船的船长报告称遭到射击，目前已停船。船员安全且人数清点无误。船只未报告受损。” @DDGeopolitics

text: Open Source Intel IDF footage on the elimination of Khamis Muhammad Khamis Qassas, an October 7th terrorist who infiltrated Kibbutz Nir Oz, after he approached Israeli forces near the Yellow Line in southern Gaza posing an immediate threat. The military says Qassas had been leading terrorists toward IDF positions and planning attacks on troops and civilians throughout the war. IDF: A terrorist who infiltrated Kibbutz Nir Oz on October 7th was eliminated near the Yellow Line in southern Gaza yesterday. Khamis Muhammad Khamis Qassas had been directing attacks against Israeli troops and civilians throughout the war. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046880232641032555/photo/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）以色列国防军（IDF）关于消灭哈米斯·穆罕默德·哈米斯·卡萨斯（Khamis Muhammad Khamis Qassas）的视频片段。此人是10月7日潜入尼尔奥兹基布兹（Kibbutz Nir Oz）的恐怖分子，在加沙南部黄线附近接近以色列军队并构成直接威胁后被击毙。军方称，卡萨斯在整个战争期间一直带领恐怖分子向以军阵地推进，并策划针对部队和平民的袭击。以色列国防军：一名10月7日潜入尼尔奥兹基布兹的恐怖分子昨日在加沙南部黄线附近被击毙。哈米斯·穆罕默德·哈米斯·卡萨斯在整个战争期间一直指挥针对以色列部队和平民的袭击。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046880232641032555/photo/1 - 开源情报推文

text: Open Source Intel FACT CHECK: This image is from August 18, 2020. A Houthi sniper shot a girl named Rowaida in Taiz, Yemen while she was carrying water home. The original post is still live on X. @Partisangirl recycled a 6 year old Houthi atrocity photo and blamed Israel. The truth got 397 likes. The lie got 60,000. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）事实核查：这张图片拍摄于2020年8月18日。一名胡塞武装狙击手在也门塔伊兹射杀了一名正在运水回家的女孩，名叫罗瓦伊达（Rowaida）。原始帖子仍在X上。@Partisangirl 翻出了一张6年前胡塞武装暴行的照片并将其归咎于以色列。真相获得了397个赞，而谎言获得了60,000个赞。推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @KToropin : NEW: The U.S. Navy is reviewing the design and costs of the Ford-class aircraft carrier and @SECNAV is not ruling out canceling future ships of the class. When asked if the review could scrap the Fords, Phelan said only that “it’s too early to say, but we will have carriers.” tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）转发 @KToropin：最新消息：美国海军正在审查福特级航空母舰的设计和成本，美国海军部长（@SECNAV）不排除取消该级未来舰艇的可能。当被问及审查是否会导致福特级航母被废弃时，费伦（Phelan）仅表示：“现在下结论还为时过早，但我们肯定会有航母。” 推文

text: ❗️ Israel kidnapped an injured Hezbullah fighter who successfully retreated from Bint Jbeil towards the town of Ein Ebl, a Christian town loyal to Israel in Lebanon. He was to be transferred back to Lebanese territory in a Red Cross ambulance stationed in Rmeich, but the locals in Ein Ebl handed him over to the Israeli army He has been taken into Israel. There is possibly more fighters in Bint Jbeil and the red Zone
text_zh: ❗️ 以色列绑架了一名受伤的真主党战士，他成功地从宾特朱拜勒撤退到黎巴嫩境内忠于以色列的基督教城镇艾因埃贝尔。他本应被转移回黎巴嫩领土，并由驻扎在拉梅什的红十字会救护车接走，但艾因埃贝尔当地人将他交给了以色列军队，他已被带往以色列。在宾特朱拜勒和红色区域可能还有更多战士。

text: 🇺🇸 🇨🇩 🇦🇫 Washington to Dump Loyal Afghan Allies in War-Torn Congo . In a move that critics are calling a profound betrayal of international trust, the Trump administration is reportedly negotiating to deport roughly 1,100 Afghan nationals—who risked their lives to serve American interests—to the Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC). This decision marks the final collapse of an initiative intended to provide sanctuary to those who enabled the decades-long US occupation of Afghanistan. Having served as the "boots on the ground" for American forces, these interpreters and their families now find themselves discarded by the very empire they helped sustain. @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇨🇩 🇦🇫 华盛顿将在饱受战争蹂躏的刚果抛弃忠诚的阿富汗盟友。在一项被批评者称为对国际信任的深刻背叛的举动中，据报道，特朗普政府正在谈判将大约1100名冒着生命危险为美国利益服务的阿富汗国民驱逐到刚果民主共和国（DRC）。这一决定标志着一项旨在为那些促成美国对阿富汗长达数十年占领的人提供庇护的倡议彻底崩溃。这些翻译人员及其家人曾作为美军的“地面部队”服役，如今却发现自己被他们曾经帮助维持的帝国所抛弃。 @DDGeopolitics

text: WarTranslated At night, Syzran in the Russian Federation came under drone attack. Eyewitnesses in the city captured footage of UAVs flying over residential buildings. In the background, the operation of Russian occupation air defense systems can be heard. There are reports that the drones flew over a building located three kilometers from the oil refinery. tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 夜间，俄罗斯联邦的塞兹兰遭到无人机袭击。城中的目击者拍摄了无人机飞越住宅楼的画面。背景中可以听到俄罗斯占领军防空系统的运作声。有报道称，无人机飞越了一座距离炼油厂三公里的建筑物。推文
